review_execution.reviewed_input: Provided RP00.P02.M02.S01 implementation diff summary plus validation summary; Claude tools were disabled with --tools "".

non_counted_attempts.reason: auth/context failure returned is_error=true Not logged in; not used as review evidence
auth/context failure returned is_error=true Not logged in; not used as review evidence
health check only; not a review

findings.title: Deliverable-specific validator is red until evidence exists
findings.description: Claude noted rp00:control-plane:validate was still red because closeout evidence had not yet been written.
findings.recommendation: Write the deferred closeout evidence files and re-run rp00:control-plane:validate with evidence present.
findings.disposition: This evidence set was written, then npm run rp00:control-plane:validate was re-run and passed as the H00 gate command.

findings.title: Fail-closed drift checks were not code-confirmable from summary
findings.description: Claude could not confirm from summary that negative tests mutate or omit fields and assert validator failure rather than comparing an object to itself.
findings.recommendation: Confirm one failing-path test per high-value drift dimension.
findings.disposition: Added explicit negative tests and RP00 validator checks for missing handoff context, missing HumanApproval context, missing HumanApproval gate, no-real-data weakening, product-state write weakening, future permission precheck drift, execution, runtime route, and implementation handoff drafting claims.

findings.title: HumanApproval boundary enforcement was not code-confirmable from summary
findings.description: Claude noted HumanApproval boundary preservation is a top-stakes legal control-plane invariant and must fail when weakened or omitted.
findings.recommendation: Add a failing-path test for weakened or omitted HumanApproval boundary.
findings.disposition: Added negative tests and RP00 validator checks for missing human_approval_boundary_context, missing human_approval_boundary_preserved gate, and doesNotReplaceHumanApproval=false.

findings.title: allow_metadata_only and no-real-data tie should be explicit
findings.description: Claude noted metadata-only input and no-real-data should not be merely independent declarations.
findings.recommendation: Confirm a test rejects real-data weakening for the handoff contract.
findings.disposition: Added negative tests and RP00 validator checks for noRealData=false and writesProductState=true alongside the allow_metadata_only decision check.

findings.title: Fixture parity should compare meaningful structure
findings.description: Claude cautioned that fixture parity should not compare a snapshot to itself.
findings.recommendation: Confirm fixture assertions compare fixture fields to canonical contract constants.
findings.disposition: Fixture tests compare handoff_context_ids to CONTROL_PLANE_AI_IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CONTEXT_IDS and check explicit fixture fields against contract constants and expected boundaries.

findings.title: Forward refs S02-S06 can rot if literals drift
findings.description: Claude noted hardcoded future refs can drift from the plan source.
findings.recommendation: Validate forward refs against the plan source or explicit validator expectations.
findings.disposition: RP00 validator checks each future ref S02-S06 in both contract JSON and module export, and the negative test rejects missing permissionPrecheck.

findings.title: Pass counts are not coverage proof
findings.description: Claude cautioned that pass counts alone do not prove invariant coverage.
findings.recommendation: Tie pass counts to explicit invariant assertions.
findings.disposition: Command evidence cites pass counts only with explicit invariant checks for drift, HumanApproval boundary, no-real-data/no-write, no-runtime, and future-ref assertions.

parsed_review.summary: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS from a read-only tools-disabled review. The initial closeout was correctly blocked until evidence and final rp00 validation existed. P1/P2/P3 findings were addressed by additional negative tests, RP00 validator checks, closeout evidence, and final validation.
parsed_review.residual_risk: Low after post-review fixes and final validation. The subphase remains metadata-only, no-write, no-runtime, no-service-execution, no implementation handoff drafting, and does not replace human approval.
